title: AISMM Bundle 8 — SDLC and Change Execution Schema
description: Full data schema for AISMM Bundle 8: SDLC and Change Execution (Work Items, Planning, Testing Execution, Releases, Change History, Knowledge Retention and History Compaction).

807_feedback_loops_and_learning_cycles.description: Feedback loops, learning cycles, improvement actions and loop outcomes

808_ci_cd_pipeline_and_automation.description: Pipelines, stages, automation gates, promotion rules and rollback triggers

809_migration_backfill_and_long_running_.description: Migration plans, schema migrations, backfills, compatibility windows and cutover plans

id.description: Stable AISMM identifier, e.g. work_item.fix_login_bug or release.v1_4_0.

time_window.description: Optional secondary factor only. Time must not dominate value, complexity, impact, or knowledge density.

delete_after.description: Optional exceptional rule. Prefer compaction and archive references over deletion.

trigger.description: Trigger may be volume-based, score-based, release-based, or manual. Time-based triggers are secondary.

age_penalty.description: Optional secondary factor. Must not dominate value, complexity, impact, or density.
